title: Real Fire Resistance│真的抗火
description: Mobs with the Fire Resistance effect will not catch fire.│生物帶有抗火效果時不會著火。
body:
# 介紹│Introduce
Mobs with fire resistance will not catch fire, rather than simply being immune to all fire damage. However, mobs will still catch fire when inside fire or lava, but not when outside.│當生物擁有抗火時不會著火，而不單單只是免疫所有火焰傷害。但是在火或者岩漿中時生物仍然會著火，離開以後則不會了。
